title: Edit Distance
problem_statement: Compute the minimum number of insertions, deletions, and substitutions to convert word1 into word2.

examples.explanation: Remove h, replace r, remove e.

intuition: Break down into subproblems and use memoization or tabulation.

approaches.name: Optimal Solution
approaches.description: A clean explanation of the optimal approach will be added here.

interview_qa.q: How do you identify the DP state?
interview_qa.a: Find overlapping subproblems and express the answer in terms of smaller results.
To avoid recomputing expensive subproblems and keep time complexity manageable.
